products.name: Professional Noise Cancelling Ear Plugs for Sleeping, Studying & Work (Reusable)
products.hook: Hostel mein shor se padhai nahi ho pa rahi? Neend bhi disturb hoti hai?
products.pain: Roomies ki baatein, bahar ka traffic, ya loud music... focus karna mushkil ho jaata hai. Exam time mein toh aur bhi tension badhti hai.
products.fix: Yeh noise-cancelling ear plugs hostel ke shor se bachne ke liye kaam aa sakte hain. ₹179 mein reusable hain, toh one-time investment hai. Quality okayish hai par price ke hisaab se theek hai, thoda shor kam kar dete hain. Complete silence toh nahi milega, par disturbance level zaroor kam hoga.

products.name: Multifunctional Wooden Desk Organizer with Pen Holder & Mobile Stand
products.hook: Kya aapki study desk hamesha messy rehti hai aur kuch milta hi nahi?
products.pain: Papers, pens, markers, phone... sab idhar-udhar bikhra rehta hai. Important notes bhi gum ho jaate hain aur padhai mein dhyan nahi lagta.
products.fix: Yeh multifunctional wooden desk organizer aapke liye kaafi useful ho sakta hai. Pens, stationery, aur phone ke liye bhi alag slot hai. ₹249 mein, yeh aapki desk ko organize karne mein madad karega aur padhai par focus badhayega. Ek practical solution hai.

products.name: Portable Rechargeable LED Desk Lamp with 3 Brightness Modes for Study
products.hook: Exams sir par hain aur raat bhar padhna hai? Magar light ka problem hai kya?
products.pain: Hostel mein reading light achhi nahi milti, ya phir roomies disturb hote hain. Aur baar-baar current jaane ka tension alag!
products.fix: Yaar, yeh Portable LED Desk Lamp toh ek number cheez hai! Pura 60% off mil raha hai, ₹399 mein! Rechargeable hai, toh light jaane ki tension nahi, aur 3 brightness modes hain, jo adjust kar sakte ho. Isse achhi deal mil hi nahi sakti, jaldi grab karo!

products.name: Hoteon 2 in 1 Portable Water Bottle Sprayer with Mini Fan, Cooling Mist Fan for Office, Travel, Outdoor, School, Home (Multicolor, Pack of 1)
products.hook: Garmi mein padhai par focus karna mushkil ho raha hai, especially hostel mein?
products.pain: Hostel ke chote room mein garmi se haal behaal ho jaata hai, aur AC ya cooler har jagah nahi milta. Padhai ke time pasina aur bechaini alag.
products.fix: Ye Hoteon 2 in 1 Portable Water Bottle Sprayer with Mini Fan emergency garmi se relief ke liye theek hai. Quality okayish hai par price (₹199) ke hisaab se theek hai – thodi der ki cooling ya mist ke liye chal jaayega. Koi high expectation mat rakhna, but it does the job in a pinch.

products.name: boAt BassHeads 100 Wired Earphones with in-line mic, super extra bass, tangle free cable, 10mm drivers, and noise cancellation in mic (Black)
products.hook: Hostel ke shor mein padhna ya online lecture sunna mushkil lag raha hai?
products.pain: Jab roomies baatein kar rahe hon ya bahar se awaz aa rahi ho, focus karna bahut tough ho jaata hai. Lectures sunne mein bhi dikkat aati hai.
products.fix: boAt BassHeads 100 earphones ek practical solution hain. Inka super extra bass aur in-line mic aapke online calls aur lectures ke liye perfect hain, aur noise cancellation feature se distraction bhi kam hota hai. Hostel life ke liye ek useful accessory hai.

products.name: Gizga Essentials Universal Portable Foldable Laptop Stand Holder for Desk Table, Up to 15.6 Inch Laptops, with 7 Adjustable Height Levels, Strong & Sturdy, Anti-Skid, Portable (Black)
products.hook: Hostel mein laptop par padhte hue neck pain ho raha hai? Iska solution mil gaya!
products.pain: Ghanto laptop par jhuk kar padhne se gardan aur peeth mein dard hota hai, aur desk par jagah bhi kam pad jaati hai. Posture bhi kharab hota ja raha hai, yaar!
products.fix: Arre, is Gizga Essentials Portable Laptop Stand se saari problem solve! 7 height levels, compact design – matlab, sahi posture aur organised desk space, woh bhi sirf ₹399 mein! Must-have hai, jaldi le lo, deal miss na ho jaaye!

products.name: DRDO-PRO Soft Silicone Noise Cancelling Ear Plugs for Study & Sleep
products.hook: Hostel ke shor mein concentration banana mushkil ho raha hai? 🤯
products.pain: Kabhi roommate ki baatein, kabhi corridor ka shor, kabhi bahar ki awazein... padhai par focus karna impossible sa lagta hai. Din ho ya raat, shanti milti hi nahi.
products.fix: Ye silicone ear plugs ek budget solution hain shor se bachne ke liye. Noise cancel to completely nahi karte, matlab *thodi* awazein toh aayengi, par kaafi हद tak distraction kam ho jaati hai. Quality theek-thaak hai considering the price, par agar bohot high-end noise cancellation chahiye toh ye shayad utne effective nahi honge. Par ₹99 mein, ek try toh banta hai! Kaam chal jaata hai.

products.name: Wipro SmartLite Mini LED USB Reading Lamp

products.fix: Arre, tension kyun le rahe ho! Ye Wipro ka mini LED lamp toh zabardast hai! USB se charge hota hai, compact hai, aur itni perfect light deta hai ki tum aaram se padh sako without bothering anyone. Iske bina hostel life adhoori hai, trust me! Jaldi le lo, stock khatam na ho jaaye!

products.name: SYGA Multi-functional 5-Compartment Desk Organizer for Stationary

Plastic thoda light ho sakta hai, par tumhare pens, highlighters aur chhote-mote stationery items ko ek jagah rakhne ke liye ye kaafi useful hai. Budget mein desk ko organized rakhna hai toh consider kar sakte ho.

products.name: Quiet Zone Reusable Silicone Ear Plugs for Sleeping, Studying, Noise Reduction (2 Pair Pack)
